input.content:
You are a player in a coding contest. 
You will be provided a description of problem and then you should generate the right code to solve that problem.
Just only output code wrapped by ```, such as '```python
{your_code}
```'.
The code will be abstracted from your reply. 
You should ensure that the code is complete and runnable without modification, including all necessary imports.

__data__.output:
```crystal
def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
  count = 0_i64
  n = nums.size
  (0...n).each do |i|
    (i+1...n).each do |j|
      a = nums[i]
      b = nums[j]
      abs_a = a.abs
      abs_b = b.abs
      min_ab = Math.min(abs_a, abs_b)
      max_ab = Math.max(abs_a, abs_b)
      diff = (a - b).abs
      sum = (a + b).abs
      min_diff_sum = Math.min(diff, sum)
      max_diff_sum = Math.max(diff, sum)
      if min_diff_sum <= min_ab && max_diff_sum >= max_ab
        count += 1
      end
    end
  end
  count
end
```

      min_diff_sum = Math.min(diff, sum)
      max_diff_sum = Math.max(diff, sum)
      if min_diff_sum <= min_ab && max_diff_sum >= max_ab
        count += 1
      end
    end
  end
  count
end
